name: Ccb Community Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank based in Andalusia, AL, offering personal and business checking accounts, home loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
CCB Community Bank is a community-based financial institution headquartered in Andalusia, Alabama, with a mission to empower community members to invest in their financial success. The bank provides traditional banking services including personal and business checking accounts, home loans, and commercial real estate financing, along with small business banking solutions.

The bank's service offerings span both personal and business segments. For personal customers, CCB offers EZ Checking accounts, home loans, and personal financial insights. For business clients, the bank provides business checking accounts, commercial real estate financing, and small business banking products. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

CCB distinguishes itself through robust digital banking capabilities, including a mobile app (CCB Mobile) for both personal and business customers, online banking platforms, mobile check deposit, real-time account alerts via Notifi, and business-focused features like ACH origination, payroll direct deposit, and bill pay services. The bank emphasizes security with routine risk assessments and controls evaluations for business customers.

As a regional community bank, CCB serves customers seeking traditional banking with local presence combined with modern digital conveniences. However, the website provides limited detail on competitive rates, fees, loan terms, or specific product features, which may require customers to visit in-person or call for detailed information.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government
Mobile app (CCB Mobile) available for both personal and business customers
Mobile check deposit capability for eligible customers
Business Online Banking with ACH origination, payroll direct deposit, and real-time fund transfers
Real-time account and security alerts through Notifi integration
Business bill pay allows payment to any person or company in U.S. (except court-ordered and tax payments)
Three-level authorized user administration with dual control features for business accounts
cons: Limited geographic presence—appears to operate primarily in/around Andalusia, AL
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APYs, fees, or loan terms
No details provided on minimum balance requirements or account eligibility criteria
Limited mention of customer service hours, phone support, or in-person branch availability
No information on competitive advantages compared to larger regional or national banks

contact.address: 225 E Three Notch St, Andalusia, AL 36420

best_for: Small business owners seeking local banking relationships with digital tools
Andalusia, AL residents needing community-focused banking with modern conveniences
Business customers requiring bill pay, payroll processing, and real-time transaction management
Individuals wanting mobile banking and check deposit capabilities from a traditional bank
diagnosis: CCB Community Bank is best suited for small business owners and individuals in the Andalusia, AL area seeking a traditional bank with modern digital capabilities and local personalized service. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal information on rates, fees, and specific product details, requiring direct contact with the bank to compare offerings against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 225 E Three Notch St, Andalusia, AL 36420
